description.p: Orbio is a privacy-first Linux browser that breaks the rectangular UI paradigm. It features a radial tab ring, arc navigation, built-in tracker/ad blocking, and a theme engine — all without any external extensions or accounts needed.

ul.li: Radial tab ring — tabs arranged in circular arcs
Arc navigation bar with spatial controls
Fire button to instantly clear browsing data
Theme engine with customizable glow effects

description.p: Initial release with core browser, privacy engine, and radial UI.
